_provenance.note: Derived from https://api.renaiss.xyz/openapi.json (schema for GET /v0/users/{id}, 200 response). NOT a mock: every field name, type, nullability, and required-set matches the API's own openapi contract as of 2026-07-02. A live-fetched success example is not included because the public API surface has no anonymous user-discovery path (marketplace exposes ownerAddress not ownerId; owner objects expose only username; frontend does not link to /users/<uuid> pages). See memory/d8-user-odds-progress.md coaching questions for the address-to-UUID bridge ask.
